title: 清明香入村

Continuity anchors: RULE_MOON_WHITE_GLINT_ONLY, PROP_QINGMING_INCENSE, LOC_OLD_WELL. Use shot override 01/assets/shot-overrides/sc008_sh003_well_glint_readability_override.png as priority reference. Style: grounded low-magic Eastern epic, tactile period materials, restrained institutional horror.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: Do not rewrite plot, dialogue, geography, screen direction, wardrobe state, or reveal rules. Use the shot override for well-rim readability. Avoid readable generated text unless final post layer supplies it. Do not reveal Yan Nanzhi, any hand/body below the well, or the full moon-jade object in episode 01.

prompts.prompt: Subject: 黑场. Visible action: 画面切黑，不展示井下人或玉片. Camera: black screen; none; movement none; vertical 9:16. Continuity anchors: RULE_NO_YAN_NANZHI_REVEAL, RULE_NO_MOON_JADE_FULL_REVEAL. Style: grounded low-magic Eastern epic, tactile period materials, restrained institutional horror.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: Do not rewrite plot, dialogue, geography, screen direction, wardrobe state, or reveal rules. Avoid readable generated text unless final post layer supplies it. Do not reveal Yan Nanzhi or the full moon-jade object in episode 01.

quality_notes: Backfilled from director-room shot list because canonical shot-prompts-draft.json was missing.
Prompts are tool-neutral and intentionally avoid ComfyUI sampler/node parameters.
SC008-SH003 now uses the well-glint readability shot override as priority reference.
Readable story text for the white register, herb name tiles, levy wooden sign, and relay map labels must be handled as post-production text layers.
